name: Tomato Vodka Sauce
recipeIngredient: 3/4 lb ripe tomatoes, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter.
2. Add the green onions and sauté for 1 minute.
3. Add the vodka and boil until evaporated.
4. Add the tomatoes and cream. Simmer until thickened.
5. Add salt and pepper to taste.
Yield: 2 cups.
